ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tested */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being tested */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment ended */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the experiment was conducted (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the organization */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date the user was active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used (e.g., scikit-learn, TensorFlow) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., tree-based, ensemble) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used (e.g., scikit-learn, TensorFlow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter setting */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., int, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., F1 Score, ROC AUC) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric value (e.g., float, int) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
